description: We first heard the Wren, simultaneously, when it started giving its check calls, higher and sharper than Winter Wren, in response to Winter Wren song playback. We were able to get some photos and audio of the bird, although other parties got better photos later that afternoon. The bird is aged by the lack of brown edging to the outer primaries and the white tips to the greater coverts, which, according to Birds of the World, both point towards definite basic plumage.
